_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)

revision_log: REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — '2025 academic review found 7 competing definitions' specific citation dropped (no source verified). Context reframed around the verified-only fact (phrase not in Constitution).
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Everyone invokes... nobody agrees' rhetorical absolute → 'major political actors invoke or contest the concept'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — '7 competing definitions' specific count dropped throughout cards.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'UMNO Malay sovereignty' (imprecise) → 'Article 153 (special position of Malays and Borneo natives) and constitutional position of the Malay rulers'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'DAP version centres on Article 8' framing made more accurate: DAP emphasises Article 8 equality while also stating it upholds Article 153.

CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Reid Commission's 1957 report describes a bargain but not a contract' (not a direct paraphrase) → 'Reid Commission records constitutional compromises and recommendations'; 'bargain vs contract' framing dropped as quotation.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — Reframe 'foundation/Rorschach test' rhetorical opinion → 'constitutional narrative that each side reads against the text'.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — View 'conversation Malaysia has avoided' → 'has had this conversation in fragments'.
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): The phrase 'social contract' is not in the Federal Constitution.
